news.title: Guild Wars 3 mission statement: no pay-to-win, no subscription fees - "The lines between an MMO and a live-service game have blurred"

news.title: Multiplayer servers for Battlefield Hardline close in under a week, but that's not necessarily the end for this zany off-shoot
news.titleEN: Multiplayer servers for Battlefield Hardline close in under a week, but that's not necessarily the end for this zany off-shoot
news.desc: We're now just five days away from Battlefield Hardline multiplayer ceasing to function on Xbox and PlayStation. Servers go offline for good on Monday, 22nd June. Read more
news.descEN: We're now just five days away from Battlefield Hardline multiplayer ceasing to function on Xbox and PlayStation. Servers go offline for good on Monday, 22nd June. Read more

news.title: Overwatch's new motorcycle-riding DPS hero Shion originally had a Devil May Cry-like style meter for skill combos, and she arrives today in Season 3
news.titleEN: Overwatch's new motorcycle-riding DPS hero Shion originally had a Devil May Cry-like style meter for skill combos, and she arrives today in Season 3

news.title: In a week of Xbox leadership changes, longtime Treyarch boss Mark Gordon is retiring from the Call of Duty studio to "focus on his next chapter"
news.titleEN: In a week of Xbox leadership changes, longtime Treyarch boss Mark Gordon is retiring from the Call of Duty studio to "focus on his next chapter"
news.desc: Treyarch, the Xbox-owned studio behind Call of Duty's Black Ops games, has announced studio head Mark Gordon is retiring from his role after 22 years with the company. Read more

news.title: Aphelion and Life is Strange developer Don't Nod in trouble as it struggles to secure funding for its next project
news.titleEN: Aphelion and Life is Strange developer Don't Nod in trouble as it struggles to secure funding for its next project
news.desc: Don't Nod, the French studio behind Life is Strange 1 & 2, Lost Records, Jusant, and more recently Aphelion, could soon run out of money. The developer and publisher revealed in a new financial report that its cash reserves may be depleted by Novembe
